selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify that a logged-in user with items in cart can view the cart page successfully
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: The cart navigation and item display involve stable UI elements such as links, icons, and list components that can be reliably targeted and verified using Playwright selectors and assertions.
